version_description: This is the version how Harry styles plays it.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
####

This is based on Harry's performance from
Later... with Jools Holland, BBC Two:

https://youtu.be/Eb0L24QXY4s

####

I recommend Em, and G for a simplified version, however,
Harry appears to actually be playing:

X02003 in place of Em, and
X20003 in place of G

####


[Verse 1]
[tab]            [ch]Am7[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Tastes like strawberries on a summer evenin'[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]D[/ch]
And it sounds just like a song[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
I want more berries and that summer feelin'[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]
It's so wonderful and warm[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
Breathe me in, breathe me out[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
I don't know if I could ever go without[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm just thinking out loud[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
I don't know if I could ever go without[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]
Watermelon sugar high[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Watermelon sugar high[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Watermelon sugar high[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]
Watermelon sugar high[/tab]
N.C.
Watermelon sugar


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Strawberries on a summer evenin'[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Baby, you're the end of June[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
I want your belly and that summer feelin'[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Getting washed away in you[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
Breathe me in, breathe me out[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
I don't know if I could ever go without[/tab]

[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]
Watermelon sugar high[/tab]

I just wanna taste it, I just wanna taste it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Watermelon sugar high[/tab]


[Bridge]
